title: Oscars 2026: 'One Battle After Another' Snatches Best Film Editing
text: One Battle After Another has won the Oscar for Best Film Editing at the 2026 Academy Awards. Andy Jurgensen, the editor of the film, received the award at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony held on March 15, 2026. The film, directed by Paul Thomas Anderson, was a major winner on the night, taking home six Oscars in total. One Battle After Another dominated the technical categories and major awards, demonstrating the film's excellence in filmmaking across multiple disciplines. The editing victory reflects the quality of the work done by Jurgensen in crafting the film's narrative structure and visual storytelling.
